];const CategorySummary=_ref=>{let{expenses}=_ref;const{currency}=useCurrency();const categoryTotals=expenses.reduce((acc,exp)=>{acc[exp.category]=(acc[exp.category]||0)+exp.amount;return acc;},{});const data=Object.keys(categoryTotals).map(cat=>({name:cat,value:categoryTotals[cat]}));if(data.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',justifyContent:'center',height:'100%',color:'var(--text-muted)'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No expense data available"})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{width:'100%',height:'100%',display:'flex',flexDirection:'column'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{flex:1,minHeight:'300px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:"100%",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(PieChart,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Pie,{data:data,cx:"50%",cy:"50%",innerRadius:60,outerRadius:80,paddingAngle:5,dataKey:"value",children:data.map((entry,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cell,{fill:COLORS[index%COLORS.length]},`cell-${index}`))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{formatter:value=>`${currency} ${value.toLocaleString()}`,contentStyle:{backgroundColor:'var(--card-bg)',borderColor:'var(--border-color)',borderRadius:'8px',color:'var(--text-primary)'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Legend,{verticalAlign:"bottom",height:36})]})})})});};export default CategorySummary;
